projectsData.name: Singularity
projectsData.impactStatement: NASA. SpaceX. ISRO. One dashboard to rule them all.
projectsData.description: A full-stack space exploration platform that pulls real-time telemetry into one immersive mission control. Live ISS tracking, 3D WebGL globe, aurora heatmaps, gamified learning with XP & leaderboards, and an AI chatbot that switches context by page. Built for a hackathon. Finished top 8 out of 100+.

projectsData.name: SIMS
projectsData.impactStatement: Built for a college. Used by the entire college.
projectsData.description: A Student Information Management System built during my internship under the college HOD. Manages academic records, internships, placements, and achievements across three user roles. I owned the frontend end-to-end — 500+ students use it daily.

projectsData.name: Recipe App
projectsData.impactStatement: Your fridge has ingredients. This app has ideas.
projectsData.description: An AI-powered recipe platform built around how people actually cook. Drop in what's in your fridge, get matched recipes instantly. Chef AI handles custom recipes, nutrition tables, and builds a taste profile from your saved history.

projectsData.name: SkillTube
projectsData.impactStatement: A platform built for the workers the internet forgot.
projectsData.description: A video-first marketplace that lets skilled workers showcase their craft and connect directly with global buyers — no middlemen, no noise.

projectsData.name: Vayu
projectsData.description: Real-time weather updates and forecasts for any location, wrapped in an interface that doesn't feel like a utility app.
